header.title: Our Advantages
header.subtitle: Creating brand scarcity — protecting profit margins in an age of oversupply.

intro.title: About ZhaoGe
intro.body: Founded in 2009, ZhaoGe Packaging Design has spent over a decade focused on packaging design and full-service brand design. We have served more than 200 clients, studying closely and innovating continuously. Our work covers most industries, with experience serving leading enterprises. Each service line operates as an independent department with clear specialization and proven cases. We deliver end-to-end service — from strategic positioning and packaging design to marketing-guided design and final rollout.

mission.title: Our Philosophy
mission.body: Create brand scarcity. In an age of oversupply, value is not the same as price; without differentiated competition, profit ultimately falls to zero. We design a brand's unique scarcity identity to distinguish it from similar products and protect its profit margin.

vision.title: What We Pursue
vision.body: Build a brand-matrix momentum that generates sustained purchasing power, helping brands succeed with fewer detours, break through efficiently, and capture the market.

items.title: Create Brand Scarcity
items.desc: Design a unique scarcity identity that makes the brand stand out.

items.title: Differentiated Identity
items.desc: Distinguish from similar products and avoid price competition.

items.title: Protect Profit Margins
items.desc: Defend profit through brand value rather than trading price for volume.

items.title: Brand-Matrix Momentum
items.desc: Systematic building that creates lasting brand momentum and purchasing power.
